title: Metabolomics for measuring polyamine levels in the plasma, brain and liver of mice
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"b7nf7","text":"This protocol details the analysis of polyamine species in plasma, brain, and liver samples using metabolomics-based approaches.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"dd56m","text":"Reagents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"djc0q","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ed0cp","text":"Methanol (80%)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"16gci","text":"Acetonitrile (solvent A)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4ut56","text":"Ammonium formate (10 mM, pH 3.8; solvent B)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b4o2e","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1j83b","text":"Equipment","type":"header-three","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"945q5","text":"","type":"header-three","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3jle","text":"Poroshell 120 HILIC-Z PEEK column (Agilent InfinityLab)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"16a5j","text":"Dionex UltiMate 3000 LC System (Thermo Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dha80","text":"Q Exactive Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Analysis of samples to detect relative values of different polyamine species (ornithine, putrescine, spermidine, spermine, N1-acetylated spermine and N1/8-acetylated spermidine) in the plasma (PND14 and 10 weeks), brain (PND14, 10 weeks and 18 months) and liver (PND14).

Dilute the samples in 80% methanol and run on liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry (LC-MS) (Poroshell 120 HILIC-Z PEEK column (Agilent InfinityLab), Dionex UltiMate 3000 LC System (Thermo Scientific), Q Exactive Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific)) operated in positive mode.
During LC, carry out a linear gradient with acetonitrile (solvent A) and ammonium formate ( 10 millimolar (mM) , pH 3.8 , solvent B) under a constant temperature of 25 °C .
MS operated full scan (range 70-150) with a spray voltage of 3.2 kV, a temperature of 320 °C , sheath gas at 40.00 and auxiliary gas at 10.0.
Set the AGC target at 3x106 using a 70,000 resolution.
Collect the data with Xcalibur software (Thermo Scientific) and analyze by the integration of peak areas.
creator: Hanne HD Dhondt
